issueContext.title: hooks-mux: async execution, regex matchers, and per-hook config
issueContext.body: Async: async:true, asyncRewake:true, once:true. Matchers: regex, OR, if conditional. Config: per-hook timeout, shell selection, statusMessage, disableAllHooks. Env: CLAUDE_ENV_FILE, CLAUDE_EFFORT, CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA. Ref: docs/agent-stack/hooks/missing-capabilities.md sections 3-5, 7

comments.author: tmuskal
comments.body: Depends on #637 for handler async support and relates to #636 for missing events and matcher patterns.

comments.author: a5c-ai
comments.body: Triage confirmed gaps in matcher evaluation, async execution, per-hook runtime config, and Claude compatibility env propagation. Recommended approach: tests first, backward-compatible types, runner config gates, async/once/asyncRewake tracking, env allowlist and precedence, and agent-platform rewake integration only after callback/reminder path is defined.

comments.author: a5c-ai
comments.body: Created the original implementation plan PR #674 with process .a5c/processes/issue-639-hooks-mux-async-matchers-config.mjs#process and matching inputs.

comments.author: tmuskal
comments.body: Implementation complete in PR #674, with conflict-fix in progress for merge.

comments.author: a5c-ai
comments.body: Created refreshed implementation plan PR #719 with a current-state gate, reuse audit, dependency readiness, runtime trace, contract design, regression test phase, scoped implementation phase, and quality gates.

priorPlan.note: The issue comments now describe implementation as complete in PR #674, so executable work should start by verifying current staging before adding code.

currentPlan.note: This refreshed plan branch is plan-only and should not modify implementation source files.

636.title: hooks-mux: implement 13 missing hook events (tool, turn, task, session lifecycle)
636.relationship: Related and partly foundational for missing events and matcher patterns.

637.title: hooks-mux: add HTTP, MCP tool, prompt, and agent handler types
637.relationship: Dependency for async-capable and typed handler support.

674.title: feat: hooks-mux async matchers and config
674.relationship: Prior merged PR linked from issue comments; verify current landed behavior before implementing remaining gaps.

acceptanceChecklist: The process starts with a current-state gate because issue comments say PR #674 completed implementation.
Reuse-audit findings are rendered before design or implementation work.
Dependency readiness for #636, #637, and prior #674 work is explicit.
Runtime call paths are traced from invoke/programmatic entry points through plan resolution, runner, merge, propagation, and session persistence.
Literal matcher behavior remains compatible while OR, regex, negation, and if conditions are covered by tests.
Per-hook timeout, shell selection, statusMessage, and disableAllHooks semantics are deterministic and tested.
Async handlers do not block synchronous hook flow, once is tracked per session, and async exits are recorded without orphaned processes.
asyncRewake is wired only if its callback/reminder path is defined; otherwise it is dependency-gated with explicit evidence.
Claude compatibility env propagation uses an allowlist and tested precedence.
Quality commands pass and final review approves before delivery.
